# Emby

Media server integration for [Emby](https://emby.media). Refreshes the library when a
download succeeds, removes items from the library when they are deleted in Riven, and
reports active playback sessions so the core knows which files are in use.

Shares an implementation with [Jellyfin](jellyfin.md) — the two are configured separately
and can run at the same time. The API key comes from Emby's dashboard under
*Advanced → API Keys*.

<!-- BEGIN GENERATED -->
<!-- Generated by `cargo run --bin gen-docs` from each plugin's `settings_schema()`. Do not edit this block by hand. -->

**Category:** Media servers

### Events

Subscribes to:

- `riven.media-item.download.success`
- `riven.media-item.deleted`
- `riven.media-server.active-sessions.requested`

### Settings

Set via environment variables prefixed with `RIVEN_PLUGIN_SETTING__EMBY__`, or in the settings UI.

| Setting | Environment variable | Type | Required | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `url` | `RIVEN_PLUGIN_SETTING__EMBY__url` | url | Yes | — | — |
| `apikey` | `RIVEN_PLUGIN_SETTING__EMBY__apikey` | secret | Yes | — | — |
| `librarypath` | `RIVEN_PLUGIN_SETTING__EMBY__librarypath` | text | No | `/mount` | Path Jellyfin/Emby uses to reference the Riven VFS mount. |
<!-- END GENERATED -->
